title: ricinella barbinervis
intro: Ricinella barbinervis, also known as Ricinolea, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Africa and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Ricinella barbinervis lie in its seeds, which are a rich source of ricinoleic acid, an unsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ricinella barbinervis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting digestive well-being. Herbal preparations of Ricinella barbinervis include capsules, oils, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, eczema, and constipation.
